name: Racing Legends- Highway Car Racing Games

reviews.review_description: This game is broken you can't back up the graphics is poor it's not how I look in the picture it's not engaging near fun answer the car looks bad when you run into a wall you can't back up or do nothing so you got to reset the game it feel cheaply made it doesn't feel realistic this game needs some improvement graphical overhaul refund please for the price this cost is not worth it
